title: Table Games+
description: All the most popular tabletop games brought to life in a vanilla-friendly way!
body:
![Table Games+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d097db7b8edae94fa194ddfeaf82cbb55192bf0e.png) ###
Adds all the best tabletop games to Minecraft, perfect for your next multiplayer world.
Play cards, chess, poker, and more! All with one vanilla-friendly and survival-friendly pack.
--- **What does this pack add?**
❤️ Playing Cards
♣️ A pack of Playing Cards can be crafted using 1 Bundle, 6 Paper, 1 Red Dye, and 1 Black Dye. This gives you a Bundle with all 50 Playing Cards (Jokers will be added in an update very soon)!

♠️ Playing Cards cannot be seen by other players when held, dropped on the ground, or put in an Item Frame. All players can see playing cards on a Shelf!

♟️ Chess Pieces
🔳 A Bundle of Chess Pieces can be crafted using a Bundle, surrounded by 8 materials. Possible materials include: - Polished Andesite - Polished Granite - Polished Diorite - Polished Tuff - Polished Blackstone - Calcite - Netherrack - Prismarine - Block of Resin One Bundle has 1 King, 1 Queen, 2 Bishops, 2 Rooks, 2 Knights, and 8 Pawns.

🔲 Chess Pieces can be placed on the ground or on a wall or ceiling, and are broken my hitting them at their base. If a piece isn't rotated how you'd like, you can right click at the base to turn them around. This rotation can even be read by Comparators!

🍪 Poker Chips
💸 A Poker Chip can be crafted using a single piece of Nether Quartz. It can then be dyed (similar to how Leather Armor is dyed) into a variety of colors! For ease of use and storage, Poker Chips can stack up to 99 instead of 64.

💰 If you hold a Poker Chip in your hand and right click, you'll mint it. This Poker Chip is now registered under your username. Nobody else can register Poker Chips the same way you can! This is great for making special currencies for your games or multiplayer worlds. Since only one player can create Poker Chips under any specific username, they can make sure nobody cheats by crafting extra!

🏆 Other Pieces
🏅 Currently, Table Games+ adds Checkers as well. They're crafted in the same way Chess Pieces are, except you use only 3 materials, and you need 3 Nether Quartz as well.

🎖️ More pieces will be added in the future, for playing games like Monopoly, Ludo, Catan, Scrabble, etc!

--- ### 🚨⚠️ The file you download is used as both a data pack _and_ a resource pack! Duplicate it and use it as both! And always, ALWAYS back up your world before adding or removing data packs! --- ### This pack was inspired by the amazing data pack [Table Games](https://modrinth.com/datapack/table-games) by 2M3V! Sadly, the original Table Games data pack doesn't work past version 1.20.4, but go check it out if you're looking for an alternative to use with your friend on older versions! I will be keeping this version (Table Games+) up to date with the most recent version of Minecraft.
